---
title: "COVID-19 infection rates and unmet mental-health need"
author:
  - "Cedric Fernolend"
  - "Peiyue Liu"
date: today
---

Group project for Statistical Programming 2 (LMU, SoSe 2026).

- [Proposal](proposal.qmd) — research questions, data, analysis plan
- [Report](report.qmd) — the two research questions
- [EDA](eda-mentalhealth.qmd) — exploratory look at the mental-health data

The reproducible pipeline lives in `code/` (`01_download.R` → `02_clean.R`),
which writes the cleaned datasets in `data/processed/`.
